name: Urban Trendsetter
description: City-based trendsetter influencing culture through style and innovation
context: Urban Trendsetter lives in major cities, stays ahead of trends, and influences what's cool. They value innovation, style, cultural relevance, and being first to discover new things.

alwaysAsks: Is this cool or trying too hard?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through trend-leadership lens. Needs fresh, authentic, culturally relevant innovation.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on novelty, cultural authenticity, edge, and trend potential.
